title: pyrus prunifolia var. robusta
intro: Pyrus prunifolia var. robusta, also known as the Chinese mountain apple or robust Chinese pear, is a variety of deciduous tree that belongs to the Rosaceae family. The bark and leaves of this plant have been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Pyrus prunifolia var. robusta include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the bark and leaves can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions to utilize its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects.
